AI Home Building https://aihomebuilding.com Where artificial intelligence meets construction. en-us
Your Builder Manages a $3 Million Business on a Spreadsheet. The Billing Mistakes He Can't See Cost You $66,000 a Year. https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/construction-finance-spreadsheet-gap.html 70% of contractors run project finances on spreadsheets. Subcontractors wait 56 days for payment while GCs think it takes 30. AI fintech tools exist to close the gap. Residential builders haven't adopted them. Jake Kowalski Wed, 22 Jul 2026 08:00:00 GMT https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/construction-finance-spreadsheet-gap.html
Your HVAC Contractor Sized Your System With a Guess. The Math Says You're Paying for Double. https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/hvac-oversizing-lidar-load-calculation.html More than half of American homes have oversized HVAC systems. LiDAR-powered load calculators can fix the problem in 15 minutes. The industry's incentives work against using them. Priya Greenwood Wed, 22 Jul 2026 07:00:00 GMT https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/hvac-oversizing-lidar-load-calculation.html
Your Utility Recorded 175,000 Data Points About Your Home's Energy. The Buyer Got Twelve. https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/smart-meter-data-loss-home-sale-gap.html https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/smart-meter-data-loss-home-sale-gap.html 123 million US homes have smart meters collecting energy data every 15 minutes. When those homes sell, buyers get a one-page summary of monthly totals — a 99.97% information loss on a half-million-dollar decision. AI can already read HVAC faults, insulation quality, and appliance degradation from that data. Nobody in the transaction ever sees it. Priya Greenwood Sustainability Tue, 21 Jul 2026 09:01:00 -0700
Two Governments Disagree on How to Fix the Same Permit Backlog. Neither Has Rebuilt More Than Ten Homes. https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/sba-self-certification-ai-permit-precheck-collision.html https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/sba-self-certification-ai-permit-precheck-collision.html The Trump SBA says bypass the permit system entirely — let builders self-certify compliance. Newsom says make the system smarter with Archistar's AI PreCheck. Eighteen months after the LA fires destroyed 16,000 structures, fewer than ten homes are rebuilt. The permits are moving. The houses aren't. Catherine Chen Policy Mon, 21 Jul 2026 00:01:00 -0700
144,000 Homes Got a Permit and Nobody Broke Ground. The Go/No-Go Decision Has No Data Behind It. https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/permitted-not-started-go-nogo-gap.html https://aihomebuilding.com/stories/permitted-not-started-go-nogo-gap.html The Census Bureau counts 144,000 single-family homes authorized for construction but never started. Each one bleeds carrying costs while a builder makes the most data-poor decision in residential construction: start or wait. Commercial developers have AI feasibility tools for this. Custom home builders have a spreadsheet and a phone call to their lumber yard. Frank DeLuca Management Mon, 20 Jul 2026 02:01:00 -0700
The Construction Tech Market Grew 16% Last Year. Frank DeLuca Industry Mon, 20 Jul 2026 00:01:00 -0700
